title: 60 Pcs Mouse Sanding Pads, Multi Tool Sanding Pads for Mouse Sander Pads, Hook and Loop Sanding Sheets, Assorted 60/120/180/240/320/400 Grits Palm Sander Pads, 6 Holes Mouse Sander Detail Sandpaper
features: Exquisite Material: The mouse sander pads are made of high-quality aluminum oxide abrasive, anti-static, wear-resistant, uniformly distributed sand grains, thick back design, not easy to damage during polishing, with long-lasting stability, ideal for grinding and polishing

Hook and Loop Design: The sandpaper for electric sander adopts a hook and loop design, easy to install and remove, can effectively grind tight corners and edges, and provides excellent results on various surfaces

Practical Design: Sanding pads are designed with 6 dust removal holes, which effectively remove dust and reduce clogging, keep the work and sander pad surfaces clean, and help improve grinding efficiency
Wide Application: Suitable for various surfaces such as wood, metal, plastic, stone, glass, wall, car paint, car polishing, etc., ideal for many sanders, and can also be used for arts and crafts

Package Includes: A total of 60 pieces of multi tool sanding pads(93mm/3.66 inches), designed with 6 sizes: 60 grit, 120 grit, 180 grit, 240 grit, 320 grit, 400 grit, each grit 10 pieces, can meet almost all your general polishing requirements
